rule: Use sticky nav with scroll-triggered border
do_pattern: Add border-bottom on scroll for visual separation
dont_pattern: Static nav disappears into content as user scrolls

do_pattern: Use 5-6 nav items plus one CTA button
dont_pattern: Cramming 10+ items creates decision paralysis

do_pattern: Add visual indicator on current page link
dont_pattern: No visual indication of where user is

rule: Mobile hamburger opens full overlay or drawer
do_pattern: Full-screen mobile menu or side drawer
dont_pattern: Tiny dropdown that gets cut off

do_pattern: h1 > h2/h3 > body text with distinct size steps
do_code: h1 { font-size: clamp(2rem 5vw 4rem); } h2 { font-size: clamp(1.5rem 3vw 2.5rem); }
dont_pattern: Using same size for headings and body

do_pattern: Max 65-75 characters per line
dont_pattern: Full-width text across large monitors

do_pattern: Scale type with viewport without breakpoints
dont_pattern: Fixed pixel font sizes that break at mobile

do_pattern: Never go below 16px for body copy
dont_pattern: Small 12-13px body text strains eyes

rule: Show validation inline not on submit
do_pattern: Validate as user types or on field blur
dont_pattern: Only show all errors after submit attempt

rule: Label every input above the field
do_pattern: Persistent visible label above input
dont_pattern: Placeholder-only inputs — disappear on type

do_pattern: Visual strength meter for password fields
dont_pattern: No feedback on password requirements

rule: Use one column layout for forms
do_pattern: Single column form is faster to complete
dont_pattern: Side-by-side fields slow completion on mobile

do_pattern: Fast snappy hover response feels responsive
dont_pattern: Slow 500ms+ hover transitions feel sluggish

do_pattern: Disable animations for users with motion sensitivity
dont_pattern: Ignoring accessibility for animation

do_pattern: GPU-accelerated properties are smooth
dont_pattern: Animating width height or margin causes reflow

do_pattern: Check contrast with WebAIM contrast checker
dont_pattern: Light gray on white fails accessibility

do_pattern: Visible focus ring on all interactive elements
dont_pattern: Removing focus ring entirely

do_pattern: Describe what image shows and its purpose
dont_pattern: Empty or missing alt on content images

do_pattern: Native elements have built-in accessibility
dont_pattern: Divs and spans for everything

rule: Lazy load images below the fold
do_pattern: Only load images when needed
dont_pattern: Loading all images on page init

do_pattern: WebP AVIF load significantly faster
dont_pattern: Only serving JPEG/PNG at large sizes

do_pattern: Prevent font flash on load
dont_pattern: Loading fonts without preload causes layout shift

do_pattern: Single most important action stands out
dont_pattern: Multiple equally styled CTAs create confusion

do_pattern: Large enough to tap accurately on mobile
dont_pattern: Tiny buttons difficult to tap on mobile

rule: Use action verbs in button labels
do_pattern: Tell user exactly what happens on click
dont_pattern: Vague button labels leave user uncertain

do_pattern: Base 8px grid for all spacing
dont_pattern: Random pixel values create visual chaos

rule: More whitespace than you think you need
do_pattern: Breathing room improves readability
dont_pattern: Cramped sections feel low quality

rule: Show loading state for async actions
do_pattern: Visual feedback prevents duplicate clicks
dont_pattern: No loading state confuses users whether action worked

do_pattern: Skeleton feels faster than blank spinner
dont_pattern: Spinner on blank white feels slow
